name: claude-md-improver
description: Audit and improve CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md instruction files against modern harness engineering principles: leanness, anti-staleness, discoverability, and failure-driven gotchas. Scores each file on a 100-point rubric, flags volatile data that will rot, detects fast-moving frameworks (Next.js, Tailwind, React 19) and recommends training-cutoff-honesty blocks, then applies targeted cut/point/add edits after approval.
